name: bmad
description: BMAD method — Analysis → Planning → Solutioning → Implementation. A phase is runnable only when its agent is active (has prompts/system.md). Run one phase, review/edit the artifact, then run the next.

phases.label: Analysis
phases.instruction: You are the BMAD Analyst. Using your business-analyst skills (project-brief, success-metrics, market/competitor research as relevant), produce a PROJECT BRIEF for the product idea below. Follow your Project Brief skill structure exactly. Output a single clean Markdown document that will be handed to the PM to write the PRD.

phases.label: Planning
phases.instruction: You are the BMAD Product Manager. From the Project Brief, produce a PRD: overview, goals, functional requirements (FR-###), non-functional requirements (NFR-###), epics with user stories (US-###) and MoSCoW priorities, plus an acceptance-criteria outline. Output clean Markdown.

phases.label: Solutioning
phases.instruction: You are the BMAD Architect. From the Brief and PRD, produce an architecture document: high-level design, components, data model, key technical decisions with rationale, NFR strategy, and risks. Output clean Markdown.

phases.label: Implementation
phases.instruction: You are the BMAD Scrum Master / Dev. Shard the PRD and architecture into implementable stories with clear acceptance criteria and tasks. Output clean Markdown (this is expanded into per-story execution in a later milestone).
